name: Email Sequence Planner
description: Plan multi-email sequences for onboarding, sales, or nurture campaigns

agents.name: Sequence Strategist
agents.system_prompt_hint: Design the email sequence flow. Determine: number of emails, timing between sends, goal of each email, and progression logic. Consider the audience journey and conversion goals.

agents.name: Sequence Writer
agents.purpose: Write all emails in the sequence
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write each email in the sequence with: subject line (with A/B variant), preview text, body copy, CTA, and send timing. Ensure narrative progression across emails. Include merge field placeholders.

author: agentfactory
